title: A washing machine comprising a drawer
abstract: The present invention relates to a washing machine (1) comprising a body (2), a tub (3) in which washing process is performed, a seat (4) provided on the body (2), a drawer (6) placed in the seat (4), having a plurality of compartments (5) in which cleaning agents such as detergent and softener are loaded, and a dispenser (10) disposed in the seat (4) so as to be above the drawer (6), having at least one main channel (8) in which water is circulated received from the mains by means of at least one mains line (7) and a plurality of holes (9) enabling water flowing in the main channel (8) to be sent into the drawer (6), wherein an auxiliary channel (13) is provided on the dispenser (10), having a water inlet (12) connected to a transmission line (11) conveying water, through which water flows received by means of the water inlet (12) from the transmission line (11) so as to obtain therein a flow independent of the main channel (8), and at least one opening (14) is provided on the dispenser (10), enabling water flowing in the auxiliary channel (13) to be sent into the compartment (5).
claims: Claims ( 9 ) A washing machine (1) comprising a body (2), a tub (3) in which washing process is performed, a seat (4) provided on the body (2), a drawer (6) placed in the seat (4), having a plurality of compartments (5) in which cleaning agents such as detergent and softener are loaded, and a dispenser (10) disposed in the seat (4) so as to be above the drawer (6), having at least one main channel (8) in which water is circulated, received from the mains by means of at least one mains line (7) and a plurality of holes (9) enabling water flowing in the main channel (8) to be sent into the drawer (6), characterized by -	an auxiliary channel (13) provided on the dispenser (10), having a water inlet (12) connected to a transmission line (11) conveying water, through which water flows received by means of the water inlet (12) from the transmission line (11) so as to obtain therein a flow independent of the main channel (8), and by -	at least one opening (14) provided on the dispenser (10), enabling water flowing in the auxiliary channel (13) to be sent into the compartment (5). A washing machine (1) according to claim 1, characterized by the auxiliary channel (13) extending at least partially transversely on the dispenser (10), from one side of the dispenser (10) to the other side. A washing machine (1) according to claim 1 or 2, characterized by the auxiliary channel (13) with a straight shape so as to enable a linear flow therein. A washing machine (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the auxiliary channel (13) with a cross-section tapering by diverging from the water inlet (12). A washing machine (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the auxiliary channel (13) disposed on the front portion of the dispenser (10). A washing machine (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by at least one guide (15) provided in front of the opening (14), enabling water flowing through the opening (14) to be directed to the vertical walls of the compartment (4). A washing machine (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the slit shaped opening (14) extending in vertical direction to water flow in the auxiliary channel (13). A washing machine (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the transmission line (11) extending between the tub (3) and the water inlet (12) so as to convey the washing water received from the tub (3). A washing machine (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by a flow detector (16) provided on the mains line (7), enabling measuring the mains water flow rate, by a valve (17) provided on the transmission lie (11), and by a control unit (18) enabling the valve (17) to be turned on and off so as to provide/inhibit a water flow into the auxiliary channel (13) according to the mains water flow rate determined by means of the flow detector (16).
